X/Y Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	In X & Y you battle through the usual eight gyms before taking on the Elite Four. As these games introduce the new Fairy type, we have the first Fairy-type gym. We also note the significant trainer battles below.

### Gym Leaders
[Viola](#gym-1) (Santalune City)[Grant](#gym-2) (Cyllage City)[Korrina](#gym-3) (Shalour City)[Ramos](#gym-4) (Coumarine City)[Clemont](#gym-5) (Lumiose City)[Valerie](#gym-6) (Laverre City)[Olympia](#gym-7) (Anistar City)[Wulfric](#gym-8) (Snowbelle City)
### Elite Four
[Wikstrom](#elite4-1)[Malva](#elite4-2)[Drasna](#elite4-3)[Siebold](#elite4-4)[Diantha](#champion-1)
